message:
fix(codegen): fix vstack flush order and stack reference bugs

Two critical bugs were causing incorrect codegen:

1. vstack flush used LIFO order instead of FIFO, causing stack values
   to be pushed in reverse order at block boundaries

2. Relative stack references like "stack[sp-1]" became stale when sp
   changed during flush, causing incorrect value reads

Fix: Evaluate all vstack expressions FIRST while sp is unchanged,
then assign them all to stack positions in correct FIFO order.

Also fixes:
- Unused data_len parameter warning in native codegen (only discard
  when .get_length opcode is not used)
- test_array_write_simple.js now passes
